responsibility: Keep claim labels, support states, evidence artifacts, and promotion gates separate.
authority_ceiling: may record support state; may not promote without required artifact
handoff_protocol: claims hand off through evidence transition records with explicit artifacts, review status, and non-claims
change_policy: schema, proof, source, or support-state changes require scaffold/proof sync, validation, changelog, and render before publication
non_claims: does not prove a claim true
